disclosures.name: TestAllocationsDecode
disclosures.reason: want-zero AllocsPerRun assert: Decode returns a []rune that the managed runtime heap-allocates where Go's escape analysis stack-allocates the non-escaping result (the test is guarded by testenv.SkipIfOptimizationOff precisely because the zero-alloc outcome depends on the optimizer); a malloc-counting shim would fail identically. TestDecode proves the decoded output is correct — only the allocation profile diverges
